CAUSE CALLED, THE COURT ORDERED THAT PLAINTIFF TRINITY CAPITAL CORPORATION HAVE AND RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NA, YOUNG S INDIVIDUALLY AND DBA ACE CLEANERS AKA SUPERIOR POSSESSION OF THE FOLLOWING DESCRIBED PROPERTY, TO WIT: KM-340 HYDRO CARBON DRY CLEANING MACHINE THREE TANKS, CONTAINMENT TANK,DELUXE FILTERS, OR IN CASE A DELIVERY OF SAID PROPERTY TO PLAINTIFF CANNOT BE HAD, THEN THAT THE PLAINTIFF HAVE AND RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT $14,000.00, THE VALUE OF SAID PROPERTY, $7,346.19 DAMAGES, $1,075.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $206.30 COSTS, $116.28 INTEREST, TOTAL JUDGMENT $8,743.77, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
